sections.paragraph:
to leap, to bound (like the Ch.), prop. used of boiling water (compare פַּחַז Gen 49:4). Hence-

(1) to be lascivious, wanton, light [ Jud. 9:4 ], (like the Syr. ܦܚܶܙ, compare Gr. ζέω).

(2) to be proud, to be vainglorious (like the Arab. فخز, compare זִיד). Part. פֹּוחֲזִים used of false prophets, Zep 3:4.

[Hence the following words.]
